code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
          count = count + 1
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(cur) > 0
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    sum = sum + v
    count = count + 1
  when None
    ()
  end
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
